welcome.title: PF2e × DSN Persistent Dice Bridge
welcome.body:
1. Open a PF2e roll dialog → task dice appear on the canvas.
  2. Drag-shake or right-click to throw. Ctrl+click multi-select then right-click throws them all at once.
  3. Empty slots fall back to RNG when you submit.

tray.noDice: No dice to roll for this formula.
tray.disabledBanner: Dice So Nice persistent dice are not active. Rolls will use RNG.

disabledReason.libWrapperMissing: Reason: the lib-wrapper module is not installed or not enabled. Without it, the tray fills but the value never reaches the actual roll — you'll see canvas value 11 but a different number in chat. Install/enable lib-wrapper.
disabledReason.moduleMissing: Reason: the dice-so-nice module is not installed or not enabled.
disabledReason.persistentOff: Reason: DSN's 'Display persistent dice' world setting is off (Settings → Module Settings → Dice So Nice).
disabledReason.interactivityOff: Reason: DSN's 'Allow players to interact with dice on the canvas' world setting is off (Settings → Module Settings → Dice So Nice).
disabledReason.managerMissing: Reason: DSN's persistent-dice subsystem hasn't initialized on this client. The DSN settings are 'requiresReload' — try refreshing the page (F5).

tray.secretBanner: Secret roll — you won't see the dice result. Falling back to system RNG.
tray.ceremonialBanner: Blind ritual — the ghost dice on canvas show "?" on every face. Throw them for the feel; the real result happens via system RNG on the GM's side.
tray.hint: Drag-shake or right-click the dice to throw. Ctrl+click multi-select then right-click throws all.
tray.selectAllTooltip: Select every task die for this roll so you can throw them all in one drag (equivalent to Ctrl+clicking each).
tray.lockAccessTooltip: Re-lock — other players cannot drag the task dice for this roll
tray.unlockAccessTooltip: Unlock — let any player drag the task dice for this roll (this dialog only; next dialog re-locks automatically)
tray.perfTooltip: Cycle DSN image quality preset (Low → Medium → High). Updates DSN's per-user settings; reload (F5) to apply.

enabled.name: Enable bridge
enabled.hint: Master on/off switch for everything this module does. Turn off to disable without uninstalling.

requireAllSlots.name: Require all dice thrown
requireAllSlots.hint: Default off. When on, hitting Roll without throwing every die first uses pure system random for the whole roll instead of mixing thrown dice with random ones.

autoSpawnDice.name: Auto-spawn dice on dialog open
autoSpawnDice.hint: Default on. Opening a roll dialog automatically puts the dice you need on the canvas. Turn off if you'd rather use only your existing manually-placed dice.

onlyConsumeOwned.name: Only use module-spawned dice
onlyConsumeOwned.hint: Default on. Only the dice this module places for a roll dialog can fill a slot. Other dice you manually drop on the canvas stay decorative.

hideDecorativeDuringDialog.name: Hide decorative dice during a roll
hideDecorativeDuringDialog.hint: Default on. While a roll dialog is open, your manually-placed dice are temporarily hidden so the canvas only shows the dice you need to throw. They reappear when the dialog closes.

taskDiceLockedByDefault.name: Lock dice to roller
taskDiceLockedByDefault.hint: Default on. Other players can't drag or throw the dice for your roll. There's an unlock toggle on the slot tray if you want to share for the current dialog.

autoSelectAllOnSpawn.name: Auto-select all dice on spawn
autoSelectAllOnSpawn.hint: Default off. When on, every die spawned for a dialog is pre-selected so you can throw them all in a single drag instead of Ctrl+clicking each.

respectSecretRolls.name: Respect secret rolls
respectSecretRolls.hint: Default on. GM Roll / Blind Roll / Self Roll dialogs spawn dice only on the client that should see the result; everyone else sees ghost ("?") dice during the throw, preserving secrecy.

suppressDsnThrowMessage.name: Hide redundant throw chat message
suppressDsnThrowMessage.hint: Default on. While a dialog is open, the standalone "You rolled X" chat message that DSN normally posts for each throw is hidden — the actual roll result appears normally.

settleBufferMs.name: Settle buffer (ms)
settleBufferMs.hint: Extra wait before reading dice values, in case visuals lag behind physics. Default 100 ms. Most users don't need to change this.

applyToReroll.name: Apply to rerolls
applyToReroll.hint: Default on. Hero point / fortune rerolls use any unthrown dice on the canvas. Throw a fresh die first, then click reroll.

autoSubmitOnFill.name: Auto-submit when all dice land
autoSubmitOnFill.hint: Default on. When every die has been thrown and settled, the dialog auto-clicks Roll. Turn off to stop and inspect modifiers before submitting.

autoSubmitDelayMs.name: Auto-submit delay (ms)
autoSubmitDelayMs.hint: How long to wait after dice settle before auto-submitting. Default 100 ms. Raise to 500–1000 if it feels too snappy.

suppressRedundantDsn.name: Suppress duplicate dice animation
suppressRedundantDsn.hint: Default on. Without this, dice would animate twice — once when you throw them, once when the chat message posts. Keep on.

rightClickAutoThrow.name: Right-click to throw
rightClickAutoThrow.hint: Default on. Right-click any of your own dice on the canvas to fling it in a random direction — no shaking required.

mirrorThrowToHiddenViewers.name: Show throws to hidden-viewer players (world)
mirrorThrowToHiddenViewers.hint: Default on. Players whose DSN visibility is "Show only mine" or "Hide all" see a brief throw animation when others roll, instead of nothing at all. Idle dice still don't appear for them.

registerPf2eColorsets.name: Add PF2e damage colors to Dice So Nice
registerPf2eColorsets.hint: Default on. Adds 11 PF2e damage types (electricity, sonic, vitality, void, spirit, mental, bleed, slashing, piercing, bludgeoning, untyped) as configurable colorsets in DSN's Damage Type Configuration. Skipped automatically when "PF2e Dice Flavor Fix" is installed.

verboseLogging.name: Verbose console logging
verboseLogging.hint: Default off. Print detailed step-by-step traces to the browser console. Turn on if you're filing a bug report.
